title: Influence the receipt (picking) created from a purchase order
reuse_advice: Override purchase.order._prepare_picking / purchase.order.line._prepare_stock_moves (only exist with purchase_stock — depend on it, not purchase). Don't hook button_confirm.
when_not_enough: receipt creation outside the standard purchase→stock path

title: Add custom data to the vendor bill created from a purchase order
intents: trường hóa đơn nhà cung cấp
đưa dữ liệu sang hóa đơn mua
when_not_enough: restructuring how bills are grouped across POs

title: Purchase approval workflow (double validation by amount)
reuse_advice: Enable double validation in Purchase settings (po_double_validation + amount threshold) — button_confirm routes to 'to approve' automatically. Don't hardcode state/approval checks.
when_not_enough: multi-level approval chains beyond the two-step standard (then an approvals module)
